content.en:
The space holy technique is complete, but the other holy skills are not complete.

Ye Tian possessed the Spatial Ancestor Method, so he was able to use the Ancestral Technique to comprehend the Spatial Sacred Technique to the Consummation Realm, but he could not also comprehend other Sacred Techniques to the Consummation Realm.

After all, the Space Ancestor Method also has a high auxiliary effect on the Space Sacred Technique, and has no effect on other Sacred Techniques.

Therefore, it was very difficult for Ye Tian to cultivate other holy techniques to the consummation realm at the level of the Returning Realm.

Unless he can obtain other Ancestor Methods, but if he wants to obtain the Ancestor Method, how difficult it is, not to mention that he only has a half-step Domain Ancestor level in the One Realm now, even if he becomes a Domain Ancestor, even if he becomes a Supreme Domain Ancestor or an invincible Domain Ancestor, don't even want to obtain the Ancestor Method.

In a place like the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, there is no great opportunity for him to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm now.

"You have to rely on the battle gate!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the Battle Gate is one of the ten holy gates, and the Light Maiden Holy Maiden can rely on the Holy Maiden Sect to cultivate the two holy skills to the consummation realm, and the battle gate should also be sure to raise his holy skills to the consummation realm, but the price paid is relatively large, and the holy gate may not be willing.

Or maybe the Holy Gate is not sure, otherwise the other Holy Gates would have already raised the Holy Skills of those Holy Endowments to the consummation realm.

In the end, I'm afraid I have to rely on myself, but Zhanmen can definitely help a little.

So, Ye Tian came to the Battle Realm Tower and found the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate.

......

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I want to cultivate the Holy Technique to the Consummation Realm, can the Battle Gate help?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain said in surprise: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, hasn't the Battle Gate been providing help to help you cultivate the Holy Technique, and those resources can also provide some help!"

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, although those resources can help somewhat, they can't make my holy skills reach the consummation realm, you should know this!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor didn't speak, how difficult was it to achieve the Holy Skill Perfection Realm, and how could he succeed by relying on those resources?

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, to be honest, how to make the Holy Technique cultivation to the consummation realm, even I don't know, I can convey your request to the deputy sect masters, as for whether the battle gate will help you, I can't be sure!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said in a deep voice.

"Thank you Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Not long after, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor did not come, and a wisp of clone of the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor came in front of Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian saw the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor and said respectfully.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, do you want to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm and then break through to the domain ancestor level?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor smiled and said, "It seems that you know that the Holy Skill Consummation can increase the foundation, and it can also make the soul and the Holy Body transform slightly." Yes, there are indeed many benefits to the consummation of the Holy Technique, but the difficulties are too great! The other Holy Disciples of the Holy Gate, you know very well that except for the lightly-clothed Holy Maiden, none of them have cultivated a Holy Technique to the consummation realm. They are all descendants of the Supreme Domain Ancestors, and they have been vigorously cultivated by the Supreme Domain Ancestors. And although you have also been cultivated by our battle gate, the cultivation intensity is not great, this is a fact. You can't be higher than the cultivation intensity of the Supreme Domain Ancestor's descendants. Even those Supreme Domain Ancestors couldn't let their descendants master the Perfection Saint Technique at the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level, you should know how difficult it really is!"

"I know, but I want to give it a try!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor was silent for a few seconds, and then said, "You are the first holy son of our battle gate, and our battle gate will naturally do our best to help you." But to be honest, the current treasures in the Battle Gate cannot help you cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm, and there are several ways to help you, but it will shake the foundation of the Battle Gate, not to mention that I don't agree, and it is impossible for the Master of the Battle Gate to agree. Therefore, the battle gate can only provide an opportunity, and you can rely on yourself to find an opportunity to complete the breakthrough!"

"Please also ask Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor for advice!"

Ye Tian's expression moved.

He knew that the meaning of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor's words was that there was hope, not hopelessness.

As long as there is hope, it is enough!

At this time, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor introduced the situation outside the Dark Forbidden Domain: "There is the Dark Sacred Domain in the center of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and there is a forbidden river around the Dark Sacred Domain, and in the endless and vast territory of the Dark Forbidden Domain, there are naturally many forces. In addition, there are enemies in the Dark Sanctuary, and many forbidden creatures. Strictly speaking, the forbidden creatures are the natives of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and we are half indigenous. Therefore, although the forbidden creatures have friction with us, they are not the enemies of life and death. There was a place where there was an amazing opportunity, but it was controlled by the enemy. Originally, I shouldn't have told you about that enemy, because it involved secrets, but that treasure land is under the control of the enemy, and if you want to enter, you will inevitably encounter them. They were born in the Dark Destruction Domain, which can be called the concentration of all negative energy in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and they contain races such as the Forbidden Zerg and the Devouring Clan, but the strongest race there is called the Destruction Holy Race, and the goal is to destroy the realm and destroy everything. Once, our Dark Sanctuary fought a great war with them, and finally defeated them, but also suffered heavy losses. "

"So that's the case, no wonder I haven't heard of the Forbidden Zerg and Devouring Clan here in the Dark Sanctuary, and it turns out that they are accepted by the so-called Dark Destruction Domain!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Is the Dark Destruction Domain far away from us?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's far away, you can't imagine it, but they can teleport over long distances, so they can invade us at any time, and if we invade them, we will have to travel a long distance. Our War Gate has a teleportation token for a treasure land, built by an invincible ancestor who was once specially prepared to cultivate geniuses. That place was also a natural treasure, so it was too valuable. According to my calculations, it should be opened soon, and there will definitely be a large number of Destruction Saint Clan geniuses entering there at that time, and there will be many Saint Endowments among them. Because of the speed at which the Destruction Saints multiply quickly, it is much easier for them to give birth to the Saints than we are. If it weren't for the invincible ancestors we had here, we really wouldn't be able to defeat them. If you want to enter, you will need to face the siege of the Holy Gifters of the Destruction Saint Clan and a large number of half-step domain ancestors, and you will easily fall. But if it doesn't fall, it will definitely be able to raise a holy skill to the consummation realm, because there is a supreme treasure that even our Supreme Domain Ancestor will be excited by - the Golden Ancestor Tablet!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor provided the Ancestor Tablet, and also showed a look of longing.
